screen.waystoneinjector.config.title: Waystone Button Injector Config
screen.waystoneinjector.config.home.butt: Furo bogga habaynta halkii-badhan si aad u hesho summadaha, amarrada, booska, iyo hab-dhaqanka wareejinta.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.home.neth: Dooro kala duwanaanta texture portal ee Nether ee la isku daray ee macmiilku awood u leeyahay.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.home.feve: Habee dhimashada ku-dhisan iyo xeerarka jihaynta hurdada ee wareejinta serverka automatic.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.action.sa: Codso qiyamka hadda oo u qor waystoneinjector-client.toml.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.action.ba: Ku soo noqo shaadhigii hore ee qaabaynta adoon ku qasbin kaydin
screen.waystoneinjector.config.action.op: Fur faylka isku xidhka macmiilka ama galka habaynta nidaamkaaga hawlgalka.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.action.do: Xir shaashadda guriga isku xidhka oo ku soo celi liiska mods-ka.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.section.b: Guji si aad u balaadhiso ama u dumiso dejimaha Button %s.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.ena: Daar ama dami badhanka menu-ka Waystone ee caadada u ah.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.lab: Qoraalka ka muuqda badhanka ku jira liiska Waystones. Koodhadhka midabka sida &a iyo &c waa la taageerayaa.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.com: Amarka socda marka badhanka la riixo. Tusaale: dib u jiheynta @s server.example.com:25565
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.wid: Ballaca badhanka ee pixels Qiyaasta la oggol yahay: 20 ilaa 200.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.hei: Dhererka badhanka ee pixels. Qiyaasta la oggol yahay: 15 ilaa 100.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.tex: Midabka qoraalka hex ee summada badhanka, sida 0xFFFFFF oo caddaan ah ama 0x00FF00 oo cagaar ah.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.sid: Dooro meesha uu badhanku ka soo bixi karo liiska Waystones: auto, left, ama right.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.ser: Kaliya tus badhankan marka lagu xidho ciwaanka serverka ku habboon. Ku dhaaf meel banaan si aad meel walba uga muujiso.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.x_o: Booska horizontal wuxuu ka dhigayaa pixels marka loo eego meelaynta badhanka caadiga ah.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.y_o: Booska toosan ee pixels ayaa lagu meeleeyaa marka loo eego meelaynta badhanka caadiga ah.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.dea: Khariidaynta dib u jihaynta ikhtiyaariga ah ee la isticmaalo marka macmiilku ogaado dhimashada serverka ku habboon. Qaabka: source->destination
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.sle: Khariidaynta dib u jiheynta ikhtiyaariga ah ee la isticmaalo marka macmiilku uu ogaado hurdo serfer ku habboon. Qaabka: source->destination
Fursad laga bilaabo 0 ilaa 100 in dib u hagida hurdada ay kiciso marka ciyaaryahanku seexdo.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.var: Dooro baakadka kheyraadka ee portal-ka Nether ee isku xiran si aad awood ugu siiso macmiilka.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.red:
Feverdream-ka kala go'ay waxay jihaysaa.
Gelin kastaa waa inuu ka bilowdaa death: ama sleep: oo isticmaal source->destination.
screen.waystoneinjector.config.field.dea: Inta ogaanshaha dhimashada waa in ay dhacaan ka hor inta aan la habaysan ee Feverdream dhimashada aan la dabaqin.
